chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-263 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of bail application 29-01-2024 None present for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** None present for the applicant; same was the position on three preceding dates of hearing i.e. 24.11.2023, 15.12.2023 and 15.01.2024; no intimation is received so far. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
